name: Soluna Holdings, Inc
summary: Soluna Holdings, Inc. develops, owns, and operates digital infrastructure for energy-intensive computing applications by co-locating data centers with renewable energy power plants, a model it calls Renewable Computing. The company serves Bitcoin mining, AI, and HPC markets. Its proprietary MaestroOS software platform optimizes power consumption and operating performance. It also offers GPU-as-a-Service through Soluna Cloud and provides data center colocation and hosting services.

products.name: MaestroOS
products.description: Proprietary software platform that optimizes operating performance and power consumption by analyzing power pricing, weather, grid demand, and market signals.

products.name: GPU-as-a-Service
products.description: Sale of GPU clusters on a per GPU-hour basis, offered on reserved or on-demand basis through Soluna Cloud.

products.name: Bitcoin Mining Operations
products.description: Modular data center design optimized for flexible, large-scale digital asset mining operations.

products.name: AI-Ready Data Center
products.description: Data center design intended to support higher-density compute environments for AI and HPC workloads.

products.name: Data Center Colocation and Hosting
products.description: Hosting services providing infrastructure such as electrical power and network connectivity for customers' computing hardware.

partnerships.description: NYDIG ABL LLC is referenced in the filing as a notable entity in connection with the company's operations.
